name: Oatmeal Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the Rummed Oat Crust dough on a lightly floured board and line a 9-inch pie plate with it. Trim and flute the edges.
2. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
3. Place the oats in a medium-sized skillet over medium heat. Cook, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted, about 5 minutes. Allow to cool.
4. Lightly beat the eggs in a large bowl. Beat in the honey, both sugars, pepper, butter, cream, and vanilla. Stir in the oats and pecan pieces. Pour into the pie shell.
5. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes. Reduce the heat to 325°F and continue to bake until the filling is firm, about 30 minutes longer.
6. Serve warm. Serves 8.
Crust: Combine oats, flour, sugar, and salt. Cut chilled shortening into dry ingredients. Mix in the egg yolk with a fork, and add enough rum to form a soft dough. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1 hour before using. Makes one 9-inch crust.
